heading: Bonded wine cellar
label: 5351 Bonded wine cellar
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5351, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 663Pub. L. 85–859

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Any person establishing premises for the production, blending, cellar treatment, storage, bottling, packaging, or repackaging of untaxpaid wine (other than wine produced exempt from tax under section 5042), including the use of wine spirits in wine production, shall, before commencing operations, make application to the Secretary and, except as provided under section 5551(d), file bond and receive permission to operate.

children.heading: Bonded wine cellar
children.label: 1 Bonded wine cellar
children.text: The term “bonded wine cellar” means any premises described in subsection (a), including any such premises established by a taxpayer described in section 5551(d).

children.heading: Bonded winery
children.label: 2 Bonded winery
children.text: At the discretion of the Secretary, any bonded wine cellar that engages in production operations may be designated as a “bonded winery”.
